name: Sweet Potatoes & Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the sweet potato and cook in 1/2 cup of water, covered, until almost done.
2. Add the broccoli and continue cooking until tender. You may need to add more water.
3. Stir in the cottage cheese and sesame seeds until blended.
Serving suggestion: 1 serving (62°C); 2 meat, 2 veg, 2 bread, 1 fat
Nutrition: Protein 22g, Fat 4g, Carbs 48g from "Vegetarian Cooking for Diabetics"
